task:
Run openwiki --init in the orchestrator folder with a 5-minute timeout. Capture EVERYTHING — output, errors, where it fails.

Steps:
1. cd ~/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator
2. Run: openwiki --init 2>&1
3. Set timeout to 300 seconds (5 minutes) — use background process with wait:
   
   cd ~/.pi/agent/extensions/orchestrator && openwiki --init > /tmp/openwiki-full.log 2>&1 &
   PID=$!
   
   # Poll every 10 seconds for up to 5 minutes
   for i in $(seq 1 30); do
     sleep 10
     if ! kill -0 $PID 2>/dev/null; then
       echo "PROCESS EXITED at iteration $i ($(($i * 10))s)"
       break
     fi
     echo "=== POLL $i ($(($i * 10))s) ==="
     tail -20 /tmp/openwiki-full.log 2>/dev/null
   done
   
   # Final capture
   echo "=== FINAL EXIT STATUS ==="
   wait $PID 2>/dev/null
   echo "EXIT CODE: $?"
   echo "=== FULL LOG ==="
   cat /tmp/openwiki-full.log

4. Report the COMPLETE log output — every line. Especially focus on:
   - Where/when it fails
   - Any error messages
   - API errors from the LLM
   - Any stack traces
   - Whether it completes or hangs
